response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of broad full-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic handled millions of req/s), plus a CS degree and demonstrated systems thinking via open-source platforms and workshops. However, the resume shows no explicit experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing frameworks, or measurement/telemetry infrastructure — the core focus of this Principal Growth role. Title is 'Senior/Staff' rather than Principal/IC6, and there is limited evidence of cross-team architectural leadership at the scale expected. Worth a screening conversation to probe experimentation depth.
strengths: 13+ years across diverse stacks (JS/TS, C/C++, Java, D) with high-scale low-latency experience
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based dev, open-source platform ownership
Demonstrated knowledge sharing and mentorship via workshops, talks, and courses
concerns: No explicit experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flag, or metrics-platform experience
No clear Principal-level cross-org architectural leadership or multi-workstream ownership
Recent roles are Senior/Staff IC at smaller companies; gap vs. IC6 enterprise-scale expectation

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering fundamentals and high-scale systems background
Seniority and cross-team leadership scope below Principal/IC6 bar
